title: Trichelostylis mucronulata

This family is part of the order Lamiales, which includes many other flowering plant families. Trachelospermataceae is a relatively small family, but it contains several species of flowering plants that are native to Asia. Trichelostylis mucronulata is native to China and is characterized by its unique flowers and foliage. The classification of Trichelostylis mucronulata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
